stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":1,"creativity-free-response":"I didn't find this game very creative or appealing. The interface feels very basic and very undeveloped. It's essentially a maze style puzzle game with a fog-of-war mechanic, when you can only see within a limited radius around your character and everything beyond that is basically hidden in darkness. The main objective seems to be exploring the map to find stuff and try to exit while avoiding certain obstacles that you´re not allowed to touch. Overall it was a very uninteresting experience, the concept feels somewhat generic and the presentation is extremely basic and unpolished.","originality-rating":1,"originality-free-response":"To be completely honest, I couldn't really understand the context of the game. All I knew was that I was a \"ball\" and I had to collect some \"relic\" and find my way out again, but I didn´t understand why or what the overall purpose was. The mechanics were fairly standard for this type of games, using the WASD keys to move around the map and more additional keys to switch between mechanics like low medium and high modes which i didn't fully understand what those modes were for since the game ended due to the time limit before I could figure it out. The aesthetics were pretty unpolished. Looks worse then a spectrum game.","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game worked and was generally functional. It did freeze once, and I hat to reopen the link again, aside from that, it ran properly. As a very basic game, in terms of functionality, its serves its purpose I guess.","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":1,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"In terms of originality, as I mentioned before, this is a type of game that has been created many times before and in much better versions. There is nothing particularly original about this project, neither in its gameplay or in its overall concept. The aesthetics and presentation are very basic and lack the quality needed to be compared to similar existing games honestly. In fact, it feels like a very rudimentary project, almost like something automatically generated without refinement or creative direction. Looks like a very basic AI prompt."}
